title: Make capabilities filtering first-tryable with natural aliases
summary: Accept natural plural/group aliases such as slides, conditional-formats, cf, data-validations, modules, and macros for capabilities --for; report requested and normalized filter metadata in JSON.
diff_sketch: Normalize --for through an explicit alias table in src/capabilities.rs, add filter/filterAliases metadata, and update the --for description in core capabilities.
risk: Low; only expands accepted filters and reports extra additive JSON fields.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: capabilities is the primary agent discovery surface

anchor_quote: first command an agent guesses must work

title: Teach exact corrections for malformed capabilities flags
summary: Unknown flags on capabilities now reject with exit 2 and an exact --for correction instead of silently ignoring likely agent mistakes.
diff_sketch: Add reject_capabilities_unknown_flags in src/capabilities.rs and route --fr/--jason-style global typo hints in src/main.rs.
risk: Low; only changes previously invalid or ambiguous invocations.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: a typo in discovery blocks all later command selection

anchor_quote: Every error names the exact flag/command the agent should have used.
counter_example: unknown flag without a copy-pasteable correction

title: Resolve common help topic aliases for worksheet rules
summary: Let agents ask for xlsx cf and xlsx dv help and land on the canonical conditional-formats and data-validations group help.
diff_sketch: Normalize help request topics in src/help.rs before matching command groups; include aliases in group help output.
risk: Low; aliases are additive and canonical output remains unchanged.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: spreadsheet agents commonly use CF and DV abbreviations

counter_example: singular or abbreviated help topic failed discovery

title: Expose accepted filter vocabulary in robot docs
summary: Robot docs now publish exact capabilities --for examples, legal filters, and alias strings so agents can discover the vocabulary in-tool.
diff_sketch: Extend src/robot_docs.rs Discovery section with capabilities --for examples, filters, and filterAliases in both JSON and text renderers.
risk: Low; additive guide fields and text lines only.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: robot-docs is the in-tool handbook for fresh agents

anchor_quote: A capabilities and robot-docs surface exists for the tool.
counter_example: guide named capabilities but not the accepted filters

title: Split vba create pure Rust and legacy Office-COM modes
summary: VBA create help and capability JSON now separate preferred pure Rust mode from legacy Office-COM mode, including conflict rules and exact recommended commands.
diff_sketch: Add a Mode guide in src/help.rs and flagConstraints metadata in src/capabilities/commands/vba.rs.
risk: Medium-low; metadata and help text changed, command semantics did not.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: VBA create is mutating and mode-confusion can create wrong artifacts

anchor_quote: Dangerous operations are gated and offer a safe alternative.
counter_example: pure and legacy flags presented as one undifferentiated list

title: Advertise conditional-format add rule-type constraints
summary: The conditional-format add capability now documents required, optional, forbidden, and repeatable flags per --type, so agents can compose valid rules without guessing.
diff_sketch: Add flagConstraints metadata to src/capabilities/commands/xlsx/conditional_formatting.rs for expression, cell-is, color-scale, data-bar, and icon-set modes.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: conditional-format add has many mutually constrained flags

counter_example: agent had to infer valid --type flag sets from prose and tests

title: Add a single agent triage mega-command
summary: Add an ooxml agent-triage or equivalent mega-command that returns quick_ref, health, top discovery commands, likely next commands, and environment findings in one JSON call.
diff_sketch: Compose existing capabilities, robot-docs, and doctor health data behind one read-only command with a stable JSON envelope.
risk: Medium; new surface design should avoid duplicating divergent docs.
test_plan: Add audit/regression_tests/R-007__agent_triage_shape.test.sh plus a Rust smoke test for schema keys.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: mega-command collapses multi-step discovery after the current pass

deferred_reason: Deferred to keep this pass focused on flag and discovery repairs; existing capabilities and robot-docs are now strong enough to compose the next design cleanly.
anchor_quote: One mega-command returns multiple useful slices in a single call.
counter_example: agent still needs separate capabilities, robot-docs, and doctor calls

title: Unify alias registries across capabilities, help, and robot docs
summary: Move the alias vocabulary into a shared registry so future command families cannot drift between filtering, help topic normalization, and robot documentation.
diff_sketch: Extract a shared agent_aliases module and use it from src/capabilities.rs, src/help.rs, and src/robot_docs.rs.
risk: Medium; refactor touches shared discovery paths and should be done after the behavior is pinned.
test_plan: Keep current R-001/R-003/R-004 tests and add a source-level unit test that every published alias maps in all three consumers.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: maintenance risk rather than immediate first-try breakage

deferred_reason: Deferred because behavior is now pinned; a shared registry is the next cleanup once the current patch is reviewed.

triangulation.consensus_diff: Good follow-up, not required for this pass.

anchor_quote: Regression tests pin every applied recommendation.
anchor_pattern: single source of truth for aliases
counter_example: alias tables now exist in more than one source file

title: Add a single agent triage mega-command
summary: Implemented ooxml agent-triage plus ooxml agent triage alias with quick refs, compact doctor health, discovery filters, alias strings, next commands, warnings, and dataHash.
diff_sketch: Add src/agent_triage.rs, route top-level dispatch, advertise the command in capabilities, and list it in robot-docs discovery.
risk: Low-medium; additive read-only surface, pinned by smoke and shell regression tests.
anchor_quote: One mega-command returns multiple useful slices in a single call.
counter_example: agent had to make separate capabilities, robot-docs, and doctor calls

title: Unify alias registries across capabilities, help, and robot docs
summary: Extracted src/agent_aliases.rs as the shared source for capability filter aliases, object kinds, command-family filters, and worksheet topic aliases.
diff_sketch: Move alias constants and normalization helpers out of capabilities.rs; use them from capabilities, robot docs, help, and agent-triage.
risk: Medium-low; refactor touched shared discovery paths and is pinned by existing and new regression tests.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: all first-contact discovery paths share this vocabulary

anchor_quote: Regression tests pin every applied recommendation.

title: Advertise data-validation and chart create flag constraints
summary: Added machine-readable flagConstraints for xlsx data-validations create, xlsx charts create, and pptx charts create.
diff_sketch: Publish per-type validation modes, range/table chart source modes, inline/external PPTX chart source modes, and output safety requirements in capabilities JSON.
risk: Low; additive metadata only and reflects existing parser constraints.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: these create commands have mutually constrained sources and modes

counter_example: agents had to learn source/mode conflicts through failed calls

title: Make doctor health contract portable when dotnet is absent
summary: Resolved the local dotnet gate by testing the documented advisory doctor-health JSON contract for both healthy and warning exits instead of assuming dotnet is installed.
diff_sketch: Expose doctor_health_snapshot for agent-triage reuse and update utility smoke expectations to accept exit 0 or 1 with matching JSON exitCode and findings.
risk: Low; product behavior stays advisory and tests now match the documented contract.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: local environment variance should not block discovery smoke tests

anchor_quote: Every error names the exact flag/command the agent should have used.
counter_example: smoke test failed on machines without dotnet despite valid advisory JSON

title: Generate objectKindsIndex from command target kinds
summary: Remove the hand-maintained objectKindsIndex table and derive it from each command's targetObjectKinds after filtering.
diff_sketch: Add build_object_kinds_index in src/capabilities.rs, replace the manual JSON map with a generated value, and add an exact emitted-JSON contract invariant.
risk: Low-medium; the index now reflects command metadata exactly, including adding entries missing from the manual map and dropping stale manual entries.

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: capabilities is the primary agent discovery contract and stale indexes mislead command selection

anchor_pattern: single source of truth for command discovery
counter_example: manual objectKindsIndex had stale entries and missed commands already advertising the kind

title: Type capability command metadata builders
summary: Build command and flag capability records through typed serializers while preserving emitted JSON and replacing direct flagConstraints mutation with a named constrained-command builder.
diff_sketch: Add CapabilityCommand and CapabilityFlag structs in src/capabilities/commands.rs, route constrained commands through capability_command_with_flag_constraints, and accept command-local --strict for capabilities.
risk: Medium; capability_commands feeds capabilities, help, MCP resources, apply validation, and agent-triage, so the pass pins emitted JSON shape and compares the decoded payload before/after.
test_plan: audit/regression_tests/R-012__typed_capability_schema_contract.test.sh, cargo test --test rust_contract_smoke capabilities, and cargo test --test rust_contract_smoke utility

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: capability metadata is the primary discovery contract and feeds several adjacent surfaces

triangulation.consensus_diff: Keep flagConstraints flexible Value payloads; type the stable command and flag envelope only.

anchor_pattern: typed internal builder with unchanged public JSON
counter_example: loose JSON map insertion and direct flagConstraints indexing could silently drift schema shape

title: Add release real-file traces for high-value OOXML surfaces
summary: Add a deterministic release trace golden covering XLSX charts, XLSX data validations, XLSX conditional formats, pure Rust VBA package/source workflows, and PPTX charts with strict validation, conformance, semantic readback, producer-exported chart fixtures, and XLSM macro-preservation checks.
diff_sketch: Add release_traces contract test, committed LibreOffice-exported chart fixtures, release-real-file-traces golden/provenance, conformance chart style content-type handling, and coverage/doc updates.
risk: Medium; touches conformance validation and adds binary fixtures, but changes are pinned by focused conformance and release trace tests.
test_plan: cargo test --test rust_contract_smoke release_real_file_traces_cover_high_value_surfaces, cargo test --test rust_contract_smoke conformance_, focused chart/data-validation/conditional/VBA gates, cargo check --all-targets

priority_components.blast_radius_reason: these are high-value business document paths and release proof surfaces

triangulation.consensus_diff: Use producer-exported chart fixtures, add semantic assertions, prove XLSM preservation for chart/data-validation, and avoid claiming Office COM proof from Linux-local tests.

anchor_pattern: release trace golden over real package outputs
counter_example: separate focused tests could pass while no single release trace proved saved outputs, validation, conformance, readback, and macro preservation together
